title: Chow Chow Bath
overview: Six people are at various stages of life: Sachin proposes to Saanvi, but she is skeptical because her elder sister is unmarried. Shashi sees the love of his life when he is at the Railway station to pick his mother up. Sathya, up to no good at a medical camp, falls in love with a girl he meets there.
